headline: Hill York Becomes Official HVAC Provider of Nu Stadium, Delivering State-of-the-Art Mechanical Systems
summary: MIAMI, April 23, 2026--Hill York Service Company, LLC (Hill York) is pleased to announce a collaboration with Inter Miami CF as the official HVAC provider at the Club’s Miami home, Nu Stadium. Hill York delivered a full state-of-the-art mechanical systems package to support the 26,700-seat soccer stadium, which opened on April 4. This collaboration reflects Hill York’s expertise in delivering high-performance mechanical systems for complex, large-scale projects that require close coordination ac

content.title: Hill York Becomes Official HVAC Provider of Nu Stadium, Delivering State-of-the-Art Mechanical Systems
content.summary: MIAMI, April 23, 2026--Hill York Service Company, LLC (Hill York) is pleased to announce a collaboration with Inter Miami CF as the official HVAC provider at the Club’s Miami home, Nu Stadium. Hill York delivered a full state-of-the-art mechanical systems package to support the 26,700-seat soccer stadium, which opened on April 4. This collaboration reflects Hill York’s expertise in delivering high-performance mechanical systems for complex, large-scale projects that require close coordination ac

thumbnail.caption: Hill York is the official HVAC provider of Nu Stadium, delivering a full state-of-the-art mechanical systems package to support the new home of Inter Miami CF.
